title: Advance Passenger Information Act, 2020 brought into force (NOTICE)
text:
VIRGIN ISLANDS
STATUTORY INSTRUMENT 2022 NO. 104
ADVANCE PASSENGER INFORMATION ACT, 2020
(No. 12 of 2020)
A NOTICE
MADE BY THE MINISTER RESPONSIBLE FOR IMMIGRATION UNDER SECTION
1(2) OF THE ADVANCE PASSENGER INFORMATION ACT, 2020 DECLARING THE
DATE ON WHICH THE SAID ACT SHALL COME INTO FORCE
[Gazetted 1st December, 2022]
WHEREAS it is provided by section 1(2) of the Advance Passenger Information Act, 2020
(No. 12 of 2020) that the said Act shall come into force on such date as the Minister may, by Notice
published in the Gazette, appoint;
NOW THEREFORE, in exercise of the powers vested in me, I hereby appoint the 1st day
of December, 2022 to be the date on which the Advance Passenger Information Act, 2020 shall
come into force.
Made by the Minister this 30th day of December, 2022.
(Sgd.) Natalio D. Wheatley,
Minister responsible for Immigration.
